negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_250
prompt: A beach scene at dusk unfolds, where a group of six friends gathers around a large, glowing circular fire pit, holding beer bottles. The sky is a blend of soft oranges and blues, transitioning into the evening. The fire pit, situated on the sandy beach, emits a warm glow that illuminates the faces of the individuals and casts dancing shadows on their surroundings. The group consists of three men and three women, all casually dressed for the evening. A man on the right of the frame is wearing a pink hat. Some of them are partially occluded by the other people. The sandy beach stretches out behind them, dotted with palm trees silhouetted against the twilight sky. A small white teepee adorned with twinkling lights appears to the right, adding a festive touch to the gathering.  The video opens with a medium shot of the group, focusing on their interactions around the fire pit. One man leans forward, raising his beer bottle in a toast, while the others join in, clinking their bottles together. They then lower their bottles back down, continuing to engage in conversation and laughter. The fire pit remains a central focal point, casting a warm light that enhances the cozy ambiance of the beach setting. As the video progresses, the friends' expressions and body language convey a sense of warmth and enjoyment as they share this intimate moment by the fire. The teepee with its string lights becomes more prominent in the background, adding a decorative element to the scene. The camera captures various angles, including a low-angle shot that emphasizes the fire pit and the friends' relaxed postures, as well as a slightly elevated perspective that showcases the entire group and the surrounding beach landscape.
